race.comment: AUSTRALIA FOREVER (3) made the perfect return here two weeks ago when jumping out of the ground late to get the verdict. Strips fitter second-up and gets the 2kg claimer engaged to aid the weight rise. Drawn sticky but can launch at the business end. TAHNEE TERRITORY (2) hasn't put a foot wrong since resuming and the form around her is red-hot. Keeps Crowther aboard and finds a suitable race to bring up the hat-trick. SILVER CHAOS (5) was less effective last time off the back of a dominant win at Balaklava. Drawn sticky but is a distance specialist. LAYIN' UP (4) bounced back sharply third-up when rounding up her rivals at Bordertown after turning nearly 5L off the leaders before scoring with a bit up her sleeve. Still has more to offer fourth-up. SO POLITE (9) has good early toe and should look to spear to the front and lead again. Will prove tricky to run down if left alone in front.
